The '''Y-8''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] which dominated mining operations throughout the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]].

==History==
[[File:Y-8_Mining_Ship.jpg|thumb|left|Y-8 doing its job.]]
The Y-8 was designed as the ultimate in mining technology, equipped with a full array of lasers and tractor beams for mining lucrative [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Asteroid field/Legends|belts]]. It was equipped with heavy [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]] for protection from [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and [[Meteor/Legends|meteors]]. The core of CEC operations near [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], the vessels were highly prized and protected.

Some mercenary groups that acquired Y-8's stripped them of their mining lasers and equipped them with more lethal [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] for use as [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Y8_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
The Y-8 was created for the [[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees|''Rage of the Wookiees'']] expansion for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. It is awarded to players at the end of a series of mining quests. Ironically, it is widely considered to be the poorest choice of ships for mining asteroids.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
